_synthetic_data_notice: All names, companies, and details in this file are entirely fictional. Created for the BriefingClaw demo at GACEP Spring 2026. Not real customer data.

vvip_roster.name: Sarah Chen
vvip_roster.title: Chief Information Officer
vvip_roster.tier_reason: Active SAB Member, C-level, Strategic Account

known_preferences.notes: Arrives early. Values punctuality. Appreciates printed materials in addition to digital.

vvip_roster.name: David Park
vvip_roster.title: SVP Technology
vvip_roster.tier_reason: Active SAB Member, SVP level, Strategic Account

known_preferences.dietary: No restrictions, but prefers light lunches (salads, sushi)
known_preferences.beverages: Black coffee, still water. No alcohol during business hours.
known_preferences.communication_style: Concise and metrics-driven. Does not tolerate marketing fluff. Leads with questions — let him drive. Appreciates candid acknowledgment of problems over spin.
known_preferences.scheduling: Prefers afternoon briefings (1:00-1:30 PM start). Mornings reserved for trading floor oversight. Never schedule before 11 AM.
known_preferences.meeting_format: Prefers structured agendas distributed 48 hours in advance. Brings his own data — be prepared for pointed comparisons.
known_preferences.travel: Flies private or first class from NYC. Prefers meetings at NYC or Raleigh EBC. Will not travel to West Coast for single-day events.
known_preferences.notes: Highly competitive personality. Respects expertise but will test presenters. Former Goldman Sachs infrastructure lead — deep technical knowledge. Currently frustrated with migration failure — avoid overselling, focus on accountability and concrete remediation. Bring architecture diagrams, not slides.

protocol_requirements.greeting: Sponsor + EBC Manager meet at lobby

known_preferences.dietary: Pescatarian. Allergic to tree nuts — critical, ensure catering is informed.
known_preferences.beverages: Oat milk latte (specific: she requests oat milk, not almond or soy), sparkling water with lemon
known_preferences.communication_style: Deeply technical — she will read whitepapers and expects presenters to have read them too. Collaborative rather than adversarial. Asks probing questions but frames them constructively. Loves whiteboard sessions — always have a whiteboard or digital equivalent available.
known_preferences.scheduling: Flexible but prefers full-day engagements when she travels. Will fly in the night before for morning starts. Prefers 8:00 AM starts with working breakfast.
known_preferences.meeting_format: Prefers interactive workshop format over presentations. Include hands-on technical content whenever possible. She has been known to open a laptop and test things live during briefings.
known_preferences.travel: Flies from Houston. Prefers Raleigh EBC for in-person. Will attend Boston or NYC for multi-day events. Always books an extra day for 1:1 follow-ups.
known_preferences.notes: Former Apache Kafka committer — deeply embedded in open source community. Respects engineering rigor above all. Currently the strongest champion in the SAB — treat with highest care. After the March 28 P1 outage, she needs to see genuine accountability and a credible RCA before her board presentation in May. Do NOT send junior engineers to present to her. She remembers every commitment made and follows up on all action items. Has a standing monthly call with Elena Vasquez.

vvip_roster.name: Pepper Minton
vvip_roster.title: CTO
vvip_roster.tier_reason: Active SAB Member, C-level, Strategic Account

protocol_requirements.sponsor_dropin: Required — casual format preferred (standing meeting or walk-and-talk)

known_preferences.dietary: No restrictions — loves tacos (breakfast tacos specifically)
known_preferences.beverages: Oat milk latte (ask barista to make it extra hot), sparkling water
known_preferences.communication_style: High-energy, fast-paced. Prefers standing meetings. Hates PowerPoint — insists on live demos or whiteboard sessions. Keep slides to zero if possible.
known_preferences.scheduling: Flexible — prefers 10 AM starts. Standing meetings only (no sitting). Limit to 45-minute blocks.
known_preferences.meeting_format: Live demos, whiteboard sessions, hands-on labs. No slide decks. If you must present, use a terminal or a live dashboard.
known_preferences.notes: Built SnackStack's original recipe engine as a weekend hackathon project. Communicates primarily via Slack — hates long email threads. Will lose interest if the meeting feels scripted. Bring energy and be ready to improvise.

vvip_roster.name: Ziggy Stardust-Chen
vvip_roster.title: VP Platform Engineering
vvip_roster.tier_reason: SAB Alumni (stepped down Q4 2025), VP level, Growth Account

protocol_requirements.ceo_dropin: Optional — recommended to signal importance for re-engagement

known_preferences.dietary: No restrictions — enjoys Cuban cuisine (Miami native)
known_preferences.communication_style: Remote-first. Prefers video calls over in-person. Allergic to corporate jargon — be direct and technical. Night owl — absolutely no meetings before noon.
known_preferences.scheduling: Afternoon or evening only. No meetings before 12:00 PM. Prefers 2:00-5:00 PM ET window. Will accept late evening calls (up to 9 PM).
known_preferences.meeting_format: Video calls with screen sharing. Prefers technical deep-dives over executive overviews. Wants to see real product, not roadmap slides.
known_preferences.notes: Left the SAB after feeling that feedback was not being acted on — specifically frustrated about support response times for FinTech-specific workloads. Wants to feel valued as a partner, not just a customer. Competitor AWS is actively courting with an EKS migration package. Contract renewal in 2 months — re-engagement is time-critical. Do NOT lead with a sales pitch — lead with listening.

vvip_roster.name: Luna Wavelength
vvip_roster.title: Chief Innovation Officer
vvip_roster.tier_reason: SAB Co-Vice-Chair, C-level, Strategic Account, $8M pipeline

executive_sponsor.name: Roberto Vega
executive_sponsor.title: SVP Public Sector
executive_sponsor.last_touchpoint_type: Executive strategy call — security audit remediation

protocol_requirements.greeting: Sponsor + EBC Manager meet at lobby
protocol_requirements.lab_access: Required — Luna tests everything hands-on. Pre-provision a dedicated lab environment.

known_preferences.beverages: Earl grey tea (hot, with a splash of oat milk), still water with lemon
known_preferences.communication_style: Deeply technical. Former NASA engineer — she expects rigorous, evidence-based presentations. Loves whiteboards and architectural diagrams. Will challenge assumptions constructively. Prefers collaborative problem-solving over polished pitches.
known_preferences.scheduling: Flexible — prefers full-day engagements when traveling. Will fly in the night before for 8:00 AM starts. Prefers Denver or Raleigh EBC.
known_preferences.meeting_format: Interactive workshops with hands-on lab time. Always have a whiteboard (physical or digital). Include architecture review sessions. She has been known to pull up a terminal and test configurations live during briefings.
known_preferences.notes: Former NASA JPL systems engineer — worked on Mars rover communications. Deeply embedded in aerospace open source community. Currently the strongest champion at GalactiCorp but blocked by CISO Colonel Drake on the $8M expansion. She needs our help building the security compliance case. Respects engineering rigor above all else. Do NOT send junior engineers to present to her.

vvip_roster.name: Max Bandwidth
vvip_roster.title: SVP Digital Transformation
vvip_roster.tier_reason: Active SAB Member, SVP level, Strategic Account

known_preferences.dietary: No restrictions — deep dish pizza enthusiast (do not offer thin crust)
known_preferences.beverages: Espresso double shot, still water. Multiple coffees throughout the day.
known_preferences.communication_style: Fast-paced, metrics-driven. Former competitive gamer — appreciates dashboards, real-time data, and visual performance indicators. Gets bored in slow meetings. Bring data, not opinions.
known_preferences.scheduling: Prefers morning starts (8:00-8:30 AM). Compressed meeting format — 30-minute blocks with 5-minute breaks. Full-day briefings should end by 3:00 PM.
known_preferences.meeting_format: Dashboard-driven presentations. Live data demos. ROI calculations on screen. Bring a calculator and be ready to model scenarios in real time.
known_preferences.notes: Former competitive StarCraft player — approaches business like a strategy game. His AI pilot saved $4M/year on route optimization but internal politics (VP Operations Helen Gearshift resisting AI) are blocking scale. He needs ROI ammunition for the board. Show him the leaderboard: how does his AI pilot compare to industry benchmarks? He responds to competition and rankings.

vvip_roster.name: Sage Cloudberry
vvip_roster.title: CIO
vvip_roster.tier_reason: No advisory program membership — first executive briefing

executive_sponsor.name: Unassigned
executive_sponsor.engagement_level: Not yet assigned — opportunity to assign sponsor at first briefing

protocol_requirements.catering: Standard level — ensure vegan options are prominent
protocol_requirements.sponsor_dropin: N/A — no sponsor assigned. Recommend assigning sponsor and scheduling introductory drop-in.
protocol_requirements.gift: Optional — consider welcome package to make strong first impression
protocol_requirements.welcome_display: Yes — personalized (first briefing — make it memorable)
protocol_requirements.special_note: Sage brings their golden retriever Biscuit (therapy dog) to meetings. Confirm pet policy at the briefing center. If not permitted, flag early — this is important to Sage.

known_preferences.dietary: Vegan — strict. Confirm all catering is fully plant-based, including condiments and desserts.
known_preferences.beverages: Matcha latte (oat milk), herbal tea. No coffee.
known_preferences.communication_style: Casual, technical, hands-on. Former SRE who still reviews pull requests. Will ask deeply technical questions but in a friendly, collaborative tone. Does not stand on ceremony — first-name basis, casual dress.
known_preferences.scheduling: Prefers morning meetings (8:00-10:00 AM start). Energy drops after lunch. Avoid afternoon-heavy agendas.
known_preferences.meeting_format: Hands-on demos are essential. Sage will want to see a live OpenShift environment. Include a comparison framework (Red Hat vs. VMware) but make it objective, not a sales pitch. Sage will see through bias instantly.
known_preferences.notes: First executive briefing ever — this is a land-and-expand opportunity. If it goes well, SAB nomination follows. Sage is evaluating Red Hat vs. VMware for their container platform. Former SRE with deep Kubernetes expertise — do not oversimplify. Brings golden retriever Biscuit to all meetings. Casual dress code. Small but fast-growing company with big ambitions in veterinary AI. No sponsor assigned yet — recommend assigning someone from the healthcare vertical.

tier_definitions.Platinum: SAB Chair/Co-Chair, Board-level relationship. Full VVIP protocol.
tier_definitions.Gold: Active SAB Member, VP+ level, strategic account. Enhanced protocol.
tier_definitions.Silver: SAB Alumni, Director+ level, growth account. Standard-plus protocol.
tier_definitions.Standard: No advisory program membership. Standard EBC protocol.
